begining_of_contract.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

loan_requestment_no.text: เลขคำขอกู้

manager_no_1.text: ฝ่ายจัดการ1

manager_no_2.text: ฝ่ายจัดการ2

official_no_1.text: ผู้อนุมัติ

combo.combo_approve_name: select sc_hr_off_member.official_no as item_code ,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name(official_no)as item_desc from sc_hr_off_member ,sc_hr_ucf_official_position where sc_hr_off_member.official_position = sc_hr_ucf_official_position.official_position and sc_hr_ucf_official_position.approve_loan_status = '1'

root.sql:
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_tel_lon_info.begining_of_contract, 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract_date--วันที่อนุมัติ ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no) as memname --ชื่อสมาชิก ,vr_tel_lon_info.loan_requestment_no ,vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no --ทะเบียนสมาชิก ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code --กลุ่มเงินกู้ ,vr_tel_lon_info.loan_type --รหัสเงินกู้ ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description --ชื่อเงินกู้ ,vr_tel_lon_info.loan_request_amount --กู้ได้ ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no)) as age_mem_text --อายุสมาชิก ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_d2d(vr_tel_lon_info.requestment_date,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,60))),1,2) as retire_age --อายุงานคงเหลือ ,vr_tel_lon_info.total_share_value --มีหุ้น ,to_snumber((((CASE vr_tel_lon_info.total_share_value WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE vr_tel_lon_info.loan_request_amount / vr_tel_lon_info.total_share_value END))*100)::bigint) as total_share_rate --ร้อยละของหุ้น --,to_snumber((((CASE vr_tel_lon_info.total_share_value WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE vr_tel_lon_info.total_share_value / vr_tel_lon_info.loan_request_amount END))*100)::bigint) as total_share_rate --ร้อยละของหุ้น ,vr_tel_lon_info.loan_coll--จำนวนคนค้ำ ,vr_tel_lon_info.amount_30pt --30% ของเงินเดือน ,vr_tel_lon_info.balance_salary ,vr_tel_lon_info.salary_amount --เงินเดือน ,to_snumber((vr_tel_lon_info.percent_salary)::bigint) as percent_salary --ร้อยละของเงินเดือน ,vr_tel_lon_info.approve_status ,vr_tel_lon_info.approver_code ,vr_tel_lon_info.approver_desc ,vr_tel_lon_info.entry_id ,pka_com_function.fp_get_user_name(vr_tel_lon_info.entry_id) as entry_name
,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long(si_security_user.membership_no) from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = vr_tel_lon_info.entry_id ) as entry_position
, pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!official_no_1!' ) as approve_name , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_position_by_offno( '!official_no_1!' )|| (CASE '!official_no_1!' WHEN '0014' THEN ' รักษาการแทน ' WHEN '0017' THEN ' รักษาการแทน ' ELSE '' END) as approve_position
, pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!manager_no_1!' ) as manager_name , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_position_by_offno( '!manager_no_1!' ) as manager_position , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!manager_no_2!' ) as manager_name_2 , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_position_by_offno( '!manager_no_2!' ) as manager_position_2
,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no) as member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no) as member_group_name
,(CASE '!official_no_1!' WHEN '0014' THEN 'ผู้จัดการ' WHEN '0017' THEN 'ผู้จัดการ' ELSE '' END) as approve_tan
FROM vr_tel_lon_info ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_rule where vr_tel_lon_info.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and vr_tel_lon_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
/*WHERE*/
